title: globulea subaphylla var. virgata
intro: Globulea subaphylla var. virgata, also known as Globularia virgata, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. The plant is a perennial herb with small, globe-shaped flowers and is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Globularia virgata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, and it can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion.
